name: Candy: M&m Christmas Ornaments
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut plastic wrap into 6-inch squares.
2. Gather corners and twist tightly.
3. Secure with a pipe cleaner.
4. Cluster individual balls into one large ball, connecting each ball with the adjoining pipe cleaner.
5. Tie "curling" ribbon around the cluster to form a loop at the top.
6. Tie two 10-inch strands of ribbon at the bottom and curl.
7. Hang on the tree with the loop ends.
M&M Candy Wreath:
1. Form cluster balls using plain or peanut M&M's, following steps 1-4 above.
2. Form a circle from a wire coat hanger, using the hook to form the hanging loop.
3. Attach cluster balls to the hanger with pipe cleaners.
4. Tie a large bow at the top of the wreath.
